latin: Crede. unum verbum in signo flavo scriptum est et in muro pendet. Tedus credit — in turma sua, in hominibus, in bono quod inest in omnibus.

questions.prompt: What is written on the yellow sign?

questions.target: His team, people, and the good in everyone
choices: His team, people, and the good in everyone

translation: Believe. One word is written on a yellow sign and hangs on the wall. Ted believes — in his team, in people, in the good that exists within everyone.
